title: Colony Formation Unit Assay

steps_raw.instruction: Dilute cell culture with 1x PBS to a final concentration of 10 6 , 10 7 and 10 8
Aliquot 40 µL of each sample onto the agar plate containing appropriate antibiotic Preparation of LB Agar by NUS iGEM
